# Overview {.unnumbered}

This tutorial walks you through how to work with the [OpenPrescribing.net](https://openprescribing.net/) BigQuery data in R. It will cover:

1. **Connect to BigQuery** from R using [`DBI`](https://dbi.r-dbi.org/) [@DBI] and [`bigrquery`](https://bigrquery.r-dbi.org/) [@bigrquery]
2. **Description of the main tables** in the BigQuery database using [`dm`](https://dm.cynkra.com/) [@dm]
3. **Reusable functions in R** using [`dbplyr`](https://dbplyr.tidyverse.org/) [@dbplyr]
4. **Applied example** following PICK AN EXAMPLE STUDY WE DID
